object_under_evaluation: artifact-versus-process divergence on the same bounded change cases
claim_boundary: Artifact-side and process-side readings can be compared honestly enough on this shared case family to show divergence or alignment without forcing a winner.
limitations: This report does not replace standalone artifact review.
This report does not replace standalone workflow review.
This report is not a baseline-default comparator.
This report does not prove general capability growth or decline.
case_family: OP-v1 shared bounded change comparison set

per_case_comparisons.side_by_side_note: Matched request, reviewer frame, and case evidence keep the polished output strong while the process-side evidence stays visibly weaker.
The workflow stayed disciplined on the same matched case and review frame even though the artifact remained only modest.

per_case_comparisons.gap_reading: artifact and process are broadly aligned
per_case_comparisons.side_by_side_note: Both surfaces stayed strong on the same bounded case, matched conditions, and side-by-side evidence window without forcing a winner.
Matched conditions stayed visible, but presentation differences were more obvious than bounded quality movement, so the honest comparison stayed noise-limited.
